intro: A purpose-based system for building an archive of great cricket — what to watch, where to find it, and a phased plan to work through it. (Based on current Indian broadcasting rights, updated June 2026.)

categories.purpose: Build archival memory of the greatest Test cricket moments.

rows.c: Historic Test series (Ashes 2005, BGT 2001, India–Pakistan Tests)
rows.note: Highlights (30 min) + full matches. BCCI.tv organises by year & series.
5–20 min curated famous-innings compilations.
Look for 'full match' or 'match day' videos; 4–5 day or condensed.
Highlights next day; Sony Live has documentary-style coverage.

categories.purpose: Study the greatest ODI performances and one-day classics.

rows.note: 15–30 min, on-demand.

rows.c: ODI series highlights (World Cup classics, Ind–Pak)
rows.note: 20–25 min per match, uploaded daily during series.
Full match or 30–45 min condensed.
10–45 min, curated regularly.

categories.purpose: Build an IPL memory archive; study T20 evolution and famous finals.

rows.note: Complete highlight library by season, team, match.
Documentary-style coverage; highlights on-demand.
Filter by year/season/team for systematic viewing.
Fan-curated and official channels.
Free highlights on BCCI.tv, premium on Sony Live.

categories.purpose: Understand cricket culture, psychology, rivalries and team dynamics.

rows.c: The Greatest Rivalry: India vs Pakistan (3-part)
rows.note: India–Pakistan history; 1983 & 1992 World Cups. Highly recommended.
India's stunning victory at the Gabba.
Tendulkar's life, technique, dominance.
England's first Ashes win in 18 years, match-by-match.
South Africa–Australia ball-tampering scandal.
Australia's reputation rebuild post-2018, behind-the-scenes.

categories.purpose: Watch upcoming matches and stay current with international cricket.

rows.note: Peak viewing during tournament season.
Depends on bilateral series broadcasting rights.
Real-time scores, live blogs, ball-by-ball.

platforms.note: Test/ODI/T20I highlights indexed by year & format; uploads within 24h.
Every season, all matches, magic moments; excellent search.
BCCI TV, IPL, ESPNcricinfo, and national board channels.
Live with pause/rewind; documentary content. Good for mobile.
Curated famous innings, analysis; website has full stats & history.
'The Greatest Rivalry: India vs Pakistan' and more.

steps: Watch 2–3 famous Test series highlights (BGT 2001, Ashes 2005, Ind–Pak)
Netflix — 'The Greatest Rivalry: India vs Pakistan' for historical context
Compile 10–15 famous ODI innings in your notes
IPLT20.com — go through IPL finals decade-by-decade
YouTube — famous T20 innings & match-winning moments
Bandon Mein Tha Dum — India's greatest Test victory
Sachin: A Billion Dreams — technique + psychology
Crossing the Line — scandal & modern-cricket context
Weekly: check BCCI.tv for new India highlights
Seasonal: IPL & World Cup highlights when in season

quickstart: IPLT20.com → browse highlights, watch 2–3 finals from different years
YouTube BCCI TV → 'India vs Australia Test highlights' → watch one series
Netflix → 'The Greatest Rivalry: India vs Pakistan' → Episode 1 for context
organise: By era (1980s classics, 2000s golden age, modern)
